title: Zombie Villager Control
description: Modify the possibility of villagers being zombified by config instead of Game Difficulty. And you can cure the zombie villager instantly if it is enabled.
body:
This mod allows you to modify the probability of villagers being turned into zombie villagers through a configuration file (config/zombievillagercontrol.toml), rather than the Game Difficulty.

The default probability is set to 1, meaning villagers will be 100% converted even with the difficulty of Easy. You can also set it to 0, ensuring that villagers will not be converted into zombie villagers, even with the difficulty of Hard.

Additionally, you can also enable the QuickCure feature through the configuration file (config/zombievillagercontrol.toml), which allows zombie villagers to be immediately cured without any waiting time.


Note：

The default configuration of [MineTeam](https://modrinth.com/mod/mine-team) converts mobs under Weakness status effect fed Golden Apples into allies. This conflicts with QuickCure and prevents its mechanics from taking effect. To use this mod together with MineTeam, adjust MineTeam's relevant configurations accordingly.
